title: CT6 automation-first Lean tactic
description: The complete compiled graph, general capability API, specialized capability profiles, node automation contracts, and semantic residual inventory for this tactic.

transitions.constructorType:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →
      {input : CT6.Input P} →
        CT6.Graph.Edge S capability input CT6.Graph.NodeId.entry CT6.Graph.NodeId.firstFailureSearch

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →
      {input : CT6.Input P} →
        CT6.FirstFailureResidual S capability input →
          CT6.Graph.Edge S capability input CT6.Graph.NodeId.firstFailureSearch CT6.Graph.NodeId.firstFailureTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →
      {input : CT6.Input P} →
        CT6.ActiveLedgerResidual S capability input →
          CT6.Graph.Edge S capability input CT6.Graph.NodeId.firstFailureSearch CT6.Graph.NodeId.activeLedgerTerminal

presentation.summary: Compiled entry node with an explicit automation contract.
presentation.label: CT6.entry

steps.plainExplanation: State, decision, certificate, or residual produced by this node: CT6.Input.
steps.label: CT6.Input

outgoingEdges.constructorType:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →

presentation.summary: Compiled computation node with an explicit automation contract.
presentation.label: CT6.search.firstFailure

steps.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration determining the first-failure search order.
steps.label: Finite failure order

steps.plainExplanation: The proposition that local activity fails at index i in branch x.
steps.label: Failure predicate

steps.plainExplanation: Converts proof of a local failure into its typed application-specific payload.
steps.label: Failure-data extractor

steps.plainExplanation: Assigns the contribution recorded for each nonfailing activity index.
steps.label: Index contribution

steps.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding whether activity fails at an index.
steps.label: Failure decision procedure

steps.plainExplanation: Framework-owned operation executed inside this node: FirstHit.beforeAbsent.
steps.label: FirstHit.beforeAbsent

steps.plainExplanation: Framework theorem certifying the semantic correctness of this node: Core.FiniteSearch.first_hit_no_earlier.
steps.label: Core.FiniteSearch.first_hit_no_earlier

steps.plainExplanation: State, decision, certificate, or residual produced by this node: CT6.ActivityDecision.
steps.label: CT6.ActivityDecision

steps.plainExplanation: Canonical first failure with its exact clean prefix and structural datum.
steps.label: CT6.FirstFailureResidual

steps.plainExplanation: Exhaustive active ledger produced when no monitored index fails.
steps.label: CT6.ActiveLedgerResidual

internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Spec.FailureData

internalDeclarations.docString: A first-hit witness retains the exact prefix certified to contain no hit.

internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.FirstHit.before

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →
      {input : CT6.Input P} → CT6.ActiveLedgerResidual S capability input → CT6.ActivityDecision S capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.ActivityDecision.active

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →
      {input : CT6.Input P} →
        (hit : Core.FiniteSearch.FirstHit capability.failureOrder.orderedValues (S.Failure input)) →
          (data : S.FailureData) → data = S.failureData input hit.value ⋯ → CT6.FirstFailureResidual S capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.FirstFailureResidual.mk

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →
      {input : CT6.Input P} →
        (∀ (index : S.Index), ¬S.Failure input index) →
          (total : ℕ) → total = CT6.activeTotal S capability input → CT6.ActiveLedgerResidual S capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.ActiveLedgerResidual.mk

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    FinEnum S.Index →

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (Index : Type uIndex) →
    (FailureData : Type uData) →
      (Failure : Core.BranchContext P → Index → Prop) →
        ((ctx : Core.BranchContext P) → (index : Index) → Failure ctx index → FailureData) →
          (Core.BranchContext P → Index → ℕ) → CT6.Spec P
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Spec.mk

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u} →
  {xs : List α} →
    {p : α → Prop} →
      (before : List α) →
        (value : α) →
          (after : List α) →
            xs = before ++ value :: after →
              p value → (∀ candidate ∈ before, ¬p candidate) → Core.FiniteSearch.FirstHit xs p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.FirstHit.mk

internalDeclarations.type: ∀ {α : Type u} {xs : List α} {p : α → Prop} (self : Core.FiniteSearch.FirstHit xs p), p self.value
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.FirstHit.holds

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → {xs : List α} → {p : α → Prop} → Core.FiniteSearch.FirstHit xs p → α
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.FirstHit.value

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →
      {input : CT6.Input P} →
        (terminal : CT6.Graph.Terminal) →
          CT6.Graph.Path S capability input CT6.Graph.NodeId.entry terminal.nodeId →
            CT6.RawOutcome S capability input terminal → CT6.ExecutionResult S capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.ExecutionResult.mk

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →
      {input : CT6.Input P} →
        {motive : (a a_1 : CT6.Graph.NodeId) → CT6.Graph.Path S capability input a a_1 → Sort u} →
          {a a_1 : CT6.Graph.NodeId} →
            (t : CT6.Graph.Path S capability input a a_1) →
              ((a a_2 : CT6.Graph.NodeId) →
                  (t : CT6.Graph.Path S capability input a a_2) → CT6.Graph.Path.below t → motive a a_2 t) →
                motive a a_1 t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Graph.Path.brecOn

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT6.Spec P) →
    (capability : CT6.Capability S) →
      (input : CT6.Input P) →
        {a b : CT6.Graph.NodeId} →
          (x : CT6.Graph.Path S capability input a b) → CT6.Graph.Path.below x → List CT6.Graph.NodeId
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Graph.Path.trace._f

internalDeclarations.type:
(motive : CT6.Graph.Terminal → Sort u_1) →
  (x : CT6.Graph.Terminal) →
    (Unit → motive CT6.Graph.Terminal.firstFailure) → (Unit → motive CT6.Graph.Terminal.activeLedger) → motive x

internalDeclarations.type:

            CT6.Graph.Path S capability input b c → CT6.Graph.Path S capability input a c
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Graph.Path.cons

  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →

internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Graph.Terminal.activeLedger

internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Graph.Terminal.firstFailure

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →
      {input : CT6.Input P} →
        CT6.ActiveLedgerResidual S capability input → CT6.RawOutcome S capability input CT6.Graph.Terminal.activeLedger

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT6.Spec P) → (capability : CT6.Capability S) → (input : CT6.Input P) → CT6.ActivityDecision S capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.analyzeActivity
internalDeclarations.docString: Search the declared finite order and retain the no-earlier-failure proof.

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT6.Spec P) →
    (capability : CT6.Capability S) →
      (input : CT6.Input P) →
        (motive : CT6.ActivityDecision S capability input → Sort u_5) →
          (x : CT6.ActivityDecision S capability input) →
            ((residual : CT6.FirstFailureResidual S capability input) →
                motive (CT6.ActivityDecision.firstFailure residual)) →
              ((residual : CT6.ActiveLedgerResidual S capability input) →
                  motive (CT6.ActivityDecision.active residual)) →
                motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.runReference.match_1

internalDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (S : CT6.Spec P) → CT6.Capability S → CT6.Input P → CT6.Graph.Terminal → Type (max u_3 u_4)

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →
      {input : CT6.Input P} →
        {motive : (a a_1 : CT6.Graph.NodeId) → CT6.Graph.Path S capability input a a_1 → Sort u} →
          {a a_1 : CT6.Graph.NodeId} → CT6.Graph.Path S capability input a a_1 → Sort (max ((max u_3 u_4) + 1) u)
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Graph.Path.below

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →
      {input : CT6.Input P} →
        {motive : (a a_1 : CT6.Graph.NodeId) → CT6.Graph.Path S capability input a a_1 → Sort u} →
          {a a_1 : CT6.Graph.NodeId} →
            (t : CT6.Graph.Path S capability input a a_1) →
              ((a a_2 : CT6.Graph.NodeId) →
                  (t : CT6.Graph.Path S capability input a a_2) → CT6.Graph.Path.below t → motive a a_2 t) →
                motive a a_1 t ×' CT6.Graph.Path.below t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Graph.Path.brecOn.go

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT6.Spec P) →
    (capability : CT6.Capability S) →
      (input : CT6.Input P) → {a b : CT6.Graph.NodeId} → CT6.Graph.Edge S capability input a b → CT6.Graph.NodeId
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Graph.Edge.source

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT6.Spec P) →
    (capability : CT6.Capability S) →
      (input : CT6.Input P) →
        (motive : (b a : CT6.Graph.NodeId) → CT6.Graph.Path S capability input a b → Sort u_5) →
          (b a : CT6.Graph.NodeId) →
            (x : CT6.Graph.Path S capability input a b) →
              ((node : CT6.Graph.NodeId) → motive node node (CT6.Graph.Path.nil node)) →
                ((b a b_1 : CT6.Graph.NodeId) →
                    (edge : CT6.Graph.Edge S capability input a b_1) →
                      (rest : CT6.Graph.Path S capability input b_1 b) → motive b a (CT6.Graph.Path.cons edge rest)) →
                  motive b a x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Graph.Path.trace.match_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{motive : CT6.Graph.Terminal → Sort u} →
  (t : CT6.Graph.Terminal) → motive CT6.Graph.Terminal.firstFailure → motive CT6.Graph.Terminal.activeLedger → motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Graph.Terminal.casesOn

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT6.Spec P) (capability : CT6.Capability S) (input : CT6.Input P)
  (hit : Core.FiniteSearch.FirstHit capability.failureOrder.orderedValues (S.Failure input)), S.Failure input hit.value
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.analyzeActivity._proof_1

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT6.Spec P) (capability : CT6.Capability S) (input : CT6.Input P)
  (hit : Core.FiniteSearch.FirstHit capability.failureOrder.orderedValues (S.Failure input)),
  S.failureData input hit.value ⋯ = S.failureData input hit.value ⋯
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.analyzeActivity._proof_2

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT6.Spec P) (capability : CT6.Capability S) (input : CT6.Input P),
  (∀ value ∈ capability.failureOrder.orderedValues, ¬S.Failure input value) →
    ∀ (index : S.Index), ¬S.Failure input index
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.analyzeActivity._proof_3

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT6.Spec P) (capability : CT6.Capability S) (input : CT6.Input P),
  CT6.activeTotal S capability input = CT6.activeTotal S capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.analyzeActivity._proof_4

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT6.Spec P) →
    (capability : CT6.Capability S) →
      (input : CT6.Input P) →
        (motive : Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult capability.failureOrder.orderedValues (S.Failure input) → Sort u_5) →
          (x : Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult capability.failureOrder.orderedValues (S.Failure input)) →
            ((hit : Core.FiniteSearch.FirstHit capability.failureOrder.orderedValues (S.Failure input)) →
                motive (Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult.found hit)) →
              ((absent : ∀ value ∈ capability.failureOrder.orderedValues, ¬S.Failure input value) →
                  motive (Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult.absent absent)) →
                motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.analyzeActivity.match_1

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → List α → (α → Prop) → Type u
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult
internalDeclarations.docString:
Ordered exhaustive search: either the first hit and its clean prefix, or
an absence proof for the whole list.

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u} →
  (enumeration : FinEnum α) →
    (p : α → Prop) → ((value : α) → Decidable (p value)) → Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult enumeration.orderedValues p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.first
internalDeclarations.docString: Ordered search over an explicit Mathlib finite enumeration.

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →
      {input : CT6.Input P} →
        {motive : CT6.ActivityDecision S capability input → Sort u} →
          (t : CT6.ActivityDecision S capability input) →
            ((residual : CT6.FirstFailureResidual S capability input) →
                motive (CT6.ActivityDecision.firstFailure residual)) →
              ((residual : CT6.ActiveLedgerResidual S capability input) →
                  motive (CT6.ActivityDecision.active residual)) →
                motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.ActivityDecision.casesOn

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →
      {input : CT6.Input P} →
        {motive : (a a_1 : CT6.Graph.NodeId) → CT6.Graph.Path S capability input a a_1 → Sort u} →
          ((node : CT6.Graph.NodeId) → motive node node (CT6.Graph.Path.nil node)) →
            ({a b c : CT6.Graph.NodeId} →
                (a_1 : CT6.Graph.Edge S capability input a b) →
                  (a_2 : CT6.Graph.Path S capability input b c) →
                    motive b c a_2 → motive a c (CT6.Graph.Path.cons a_1 a_2)) →
              {a a_1 : CT6.Graph.NodeId} → (t : CT6.Graph.Path S capability input a a_1) → motive a a_1 t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Graph.Path.rec

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →
      {input : CT6.Input P} →
        {motive : (a a_1 : CT6.Graph.NodeId) → CT6.Graph.Path S capability input a a_1 → Sort u} →
          {a a_1 : CT6.Graph.NodeId} →
            (t : CT6.Graph.Path S capability input a a_1) →
              ((node : CT6.Graph.NodeId) → motive node node (CT6.Graph.Path.nil node)) →
                ({a b c : CT6.Graph.NodeId} →
                    (a_2 : CT6.Graph.Edge S capability input a b) →
                      (a_3 : CT6.Graph.Path S capability input b c) → motive a c (CT6.Graph.Path.cons a_2 a_3)) →
                  motive a a_1 t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Graph.Path.casesOn

internalDeclarations.type:
{motive : CT6.Graph.Terminal → Sort u} →
  motive CT6.Graph.Terminal.firstFailure → motive CT6.Graph.Terminal.activeLedger → (t : CT6.Graph.Terminal) → motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Graph.Terminal.rec

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → {xs : List α} → {p : α → Prop} → (∀ value ∈ xs, ¬p value) → Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult xs p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult.absent

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u} →
  {xs : List α} →
    {p : α → Prop} →
      {motive : Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult xs p → Sort u_1} →
        (t : Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult xs p) →
          ((hit : Core.FiniteSearch.FirstHit xs p) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult.found hit)) →
            ((none : ∀ value ∈ xs, ¬p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult.absent none)) → motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult.casesOn

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → {xs : List α} → {p : α → Prop} → Core.FiniteSearch.FirstHit xs p → Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult xs p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult.found

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → (xs : List α) → (p : α → Prop) → ((value : α) → Decidable (p value)) → Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult xs p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.firstOnList
internalDeclarations.docString: Proof-carrying first-hit view of Mathlib's executable `List.find?`.

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT6.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT6.Capability S} →
      {input : CT6.Input P} →
        {motive : CT6.ActivityDecision S capability input → Sort u} →
          ((residual : CT6.FirstFailureResidual S capability input) →
              motive (CT6.ActivityDecision.firstFailure residual)) →
            ((residual : CT6.ActiveLedgerResidual S capability input) → motive (CT6.ActivityDecision.active residual)) →
              (t : CT6.ActivityDecision S capability input) → motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.ActivityDecision.rec

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u} →
  {xs : List α} →
    {p : α → Prop} →
      {motive : Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult xs p → Sort u_1} →
        ((hit : Core.FiniteSearch.FirstHit xs p) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult.found hit)) →
          ((none : ∀ value ∈ xs, ¬p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult.absent none)) →
            (t : Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult xs p) → motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult.rec

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (xs : List α) (p : α → Prop) (decideP : (value : α) → Decidable (p value)) (index : ℕ),
  List.findIdx? (fun value => decide (p value)) xs = some index → index < xs.length
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.firstOnList._proof_1

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (xs : List α) (p : α → Prop) (decideP : (value : α) → Decidable (p value)) (index : ℕ),
  List.findIdx? (fun value => decide (p value)) xs = some index →
    List.findIdx (fun value => decide (p value)) xs = index
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.firstOnList._proof_2

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (xs : List α) (p : α → Prop) (decideP : (value : α) → Decidable (p value)) (index : ℕ),
  List.findIdx? (fun value => decide (p value)) xs = some index →
    ∀ (bound : index < xs.length), decide (p xs[index]) = true
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.firstOnList._proof_3

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (xs : List α) (index : ℕ) (bound : index < xs.length),
  xs = List.take index xs ++ xs[index] :: List.drop (index + 1) xs
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.firstOnList._proof_4

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (xs : List α) (p : α → Prop) (decideP : (value : α) → Decidable (p value)) (index : ℕ)
  (bound : index < xs.length), (fun value => decide (p value)) xs[index] = true → p xs[index]
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.firstOnList._proof_5

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (xs : List α) (p : α → Prop) (decideP : (value : α) → Decidable (p value)) (index : ℕ),
  List.findIdx (fun value => decide (p value)) xs = index → ∀ candidate ∈ List.take index xs, p candidate → False
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.firstOnList._proof_6

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (xs : List α) (p : α → Prop) (decideP : (value : α) → Decidable (p value)),
  List.findIdx? (fun value => decide (p value)) xs = none → ∀ value ∈ xs, p value → False
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.firstOnList._proof_7

internalDeclarations.type:
(motive : Option ℕ → Sort u_1) →
  (x : Option ℕ) → ((index : ℕ) → x = some index → motive (some index)) → (x = none → motive none) → motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.firstOnList.match_1

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Spec.contribution

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration determining the first-failure search order.
presentation.label: Finite failure order

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT6.Spec P} → CT6.Capability S → FinEnum S.Index
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Capability.failureOrder

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding whether activity fails at an index.
presentation.label: Failure decision procedure

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT6.Spec P) → CT6.Capability S → CT6.Input P → CT6.Graph.NodeId → CT6.Graph.NodeId → Type (max u_3 u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Graph.Path

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (S : CT6.Spec P) → CT6.Capability S → CT6.Input P → List CT6.Graph.NodeId → Prop
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Graph.ValidTrace

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT6.Spec P → Type (max (max u_1 u_2) u_3)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Capability

apiDeclarations.type: Core.Problem → Type (max u_1 u_2)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.Input

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (S : CT6.Spec P) → CT6.Capability S → CT6.Input P → Type (max u_3 u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.ExecutionResult

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (S : CT6.Spec P) → CT6.Capability S → CT6.Input P → CT6.Graph.Terminal → Type (max u_3 u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.RawOutcome

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT6.Spec P) → (capability : CT6.Capability S) → (input : CT6.Input P) → CT6.ExecutionResult S capability input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.run

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT6.Spec P) → (capability : CT6.Capability S) → (input : CT6.Input P) → CT6.ExecutionResult S capability input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.runReference

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT6.Spec P) (capability : CT6.Capability S) (input : CT6.Input P),
  CT6.RawOutcome.Valid S capability input (CT6.run S capability input).outcome
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.run_verified

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT6.Spec P) (capability : CT6.Capability S) (input : CT6.Input P),
  CT6.Graph.ValidTrace S capability input (CT6.ExecutionResult.trace S capability input (CT6.run S capability input))
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.run_trace_valid

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT6.Spec P) (capability : CT6.Capability S) (input : CT6.Input P),
  ∃ result,
    CT6.RawOutcome.Valid S capability input result.outcome ∧
      CT6.Graph.ValidTrace S capability input (CT6.ExecutionResult.trace S capability input result)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.run_total

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT6.Spec P) (capability : CT6.Capability S) (input : CT6.Input P)
  (left right : CT6.ExecutionResult S capability input),
  left = CT6.run S capability input → right = CT6.run S capability input → left = right
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.run_deterministic

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT6.Spec P) (capability : CT6.Capability S) (input : CT6.Input P)
  (result : CT6.ExecutionResult S capability input),
  result.terminal = CT6.Graph.Terminal.firstFailure ∨ result.terminal = CT6.Graph.Terminal.activeLedger
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT6.outcome_exhaustive
